unit_height.description: Unit Height. Symbol: H_{unit}. Units: in. Height of the Unit being installed

unit_width.description: Unit Width. Symbol: W_{unit}. Units: in. Width of the Unit being installed

unit_length.description: Unit Length. Symbol: L_{unit}. Units: in. Length of the Unit being installed

curb_height.description: Curb Height. Symbol: H_{curb}. Units: in. Height of the Curb

weight.description: Weight of Unit. Symbol: W_{unit}. Units: lb. Weight of the Unit, including the weight of the curb

V.description: Basic Wind Speed. Symbol: V. Units: mi/h. See Figures 26.5-1 to 26.5-2 of ASCE 7-16.

Kzt.description: Topographic Factor, Kzt. Symbol: K_{zt}. Topographic Factor

Kd.description: Wind Directionality Factor, Kd. Symbol: K_{d}. Wind Directionality Factor

Ke.description: Elevation Factor, Ke. Symbol: K_{e}. Elevation Factor

h.description: Mean roof height of the building, h. Units: ft. Mean roof height of the building

SDS.description: SDS. Symbol: S_{DS}. Short-period Spectral Acceleration from Section 11.4.5 of ASCE 7-16

Ip.description: Ip. Symbol: I_{p}. Component Importance Factor, Ip from Section 13.1.3 of ASCE 7-16

Rp.description: Rp. Symbol: R_{p}. Component Response Modification Factor, Rp from Table 13.5-1 or 13.6-1 of ASCE 7-16

ap.description: ap. Symbol: a_{p}. Component Amplification Factor, ap from Table 13.5-1 or 13.6-1 of ASCE 7-16

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
